title: Fig. 1 in Microbiological And Genetic Analysis Of Fungi In Discoloured Silver Birch (Betula Pendula Roth) Wood
author: Bitenieks, Krišs
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. DGGE profiles of amplicons from PCR with ITS1f-GC/ITS2 primers and DNA from 12 discoloured wood sample. Image of the DGGE gel consist of two separated runs without reference ladder.
steps_raw: Fig. 1. DGGE profiles of amplicons from PCR with ITS1f-GC/ITS2 primers and DNA from 12 discoloured wood sample. Image of the DGGE gel consist of two separated runs without reference ladder.
